about.heading: About Me
about.intro: Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience, passionate about deep ocean and freediving.
about.description: I work at Tinke where I develop full-stack solutions. In the first 2 years I worked with Angular and Symfony, then I shifted to backend with Symfony and Python, specializing in AI with LangChain and LangGraph. I'm currently developing a Multi-Tenant SaaS with a multi-agent system for creating custom AI agents.
about.passion: I love the deep ocean, freediving, and Subnautica. My personal freediving record is 22 meters.

saas.title: SaaS Multi-Agent Platform
saas.description: Multi-Tenant multi-agent system enabling the creation of custom AI agents. Built with Symfony and Python (LangChain/LangGraph).
saas.note: Screenshots coming soon - company project under active development.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Starter Kit
restaurant.description: CLI tool for quickly creating and managing restaurant websites at scale. Monorepo architecture with shared design system.

icdome.title: ICDome
icdome.description: Mobile app (iOS/Android) for corporate Travel Security Management. Features real-time travel monitoring, SOS emergency handling, and destination warnings. Built using Angular and Symfony.

legacy.heading: Legacy Projects
legacy.subtitle: My first projects, built during high school - fossils from my journey

paleoscovery.title: Paleoscovery
paleoscovery.description: Educational game about Pietro Paleocapa built with Unity with 2 school friends.

beedone.title: BeeDone
beedone.description: Mobile task management app built with Flutter.

flows.title: Flows Music
flows.description: Mobile music streaming app built with Flutter.

tod.title: Truth or Dare
tod.description: Mobile Truth or Dare game built with Unity.
